name: Honey-Soy Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, whisk together the honey, soy sauce, and cornstarch.
2. Add the chicken to the marinade and coat evenly.
3. Cover and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes or up to 4 hours.
4. Remove the chicken from the marinade and pat dry with paper towels.
5. Heat a large skillet over medium-high heat and add oil.
6. Cook the chicken until golden brown, about 2-3 minutes per side.
7. Turn off the heat and serve the honey-soy chicken hot.
